prompt: My Card component is supposed to have rounded corners (border-radius: 12px is in the CSS) but they're completely square when rendered on the dashboard page. I added border-radius: 12px !important to the .card class — still square. I also tried adding border-radius directly to the Card component as an inline style — no change. The corners are just flat. The weird thing is if I render the Card in isolation (not inside the DashboardLayout), the corners show up fine.
assertions: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for what could be causing the bug
Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
Correctly identifies overflow: hidden on the parent .content-area as the cause of clipped corners
Fix modifies Layout.css rather than Card.css
